steps: Vortex for 00:00:15 on full speed when mixing. Thaw all components to Room temperature .
Insert DG8™ Cartridge into cartridge holder (Figure 8). Figure 8. Loaded DG8 Cartridge [7]
FIRST: Load > 20 µL sample into wells. Empty wells: Add a 50:50 mix of Supermix & water. All 8 wells must be loaded with samples or supermix + water. No bubbles!!!
THEN: Load 70 µL of generation oil into all 8 wells. Generation oil is one-time use/can only be used within a day once opened.
Apply a DG8™ Gasket on cartridge.
Load cartridge into QX200™ Droplet Generator (Figure 9). Figure 9. Loaded GD8 Cartridge in QX200™ Droplet Generator [8]
Transfer 40 µL droplets to a ddPCR™ 96-Well Plates. Pipette SLOWLY for droplet suction and dispensing (> 00:00:07 ).
Cover 96w plate with a foil seal sheet – Red line facing up (Figure 10). Figure 10. 96-well plate covered with foil seal sheet [3]
Seal plate in a PX1 PCR Plate Sealer (Figure 11). 180 °C for 00:00:05 Figure 11. Bio-Rad PX1 PCR Plate Sealer [9]

Place plate into Bio-Rad Thermal Cycler with 96-Deep Well C1000 block. ddPCR cycle: %s %s Optimized annealing temperature when using primers/probe set for the first time byusing gradient temperatures.
Set plate in Room temperature for 00:01:00 - 00:02:00 . The plate can be stored at 4 °C for ≤3 days before reading.
Place plate in Bio-Rad QX200™ Droplet Reader (Figure 12). Figure12. Bio-Rad QX200™ Droplet Reader [10]

Open QuantaSow™ & set up. Select a well Example Sample - Enter name- Experiment: CNV2- Supermix: ddPCR Supermix for Probes (no dUTP) Target 1 (FAM) - Enter name- Type: Ch 1 Unknown Target 2 (HEX/VIC) - Enter name (e.g. RPP30)- Type: Ch 2 Reference Copy & paste for every well used in the plate.
Save template.
RUN

Set threshold manually (pink line). Make sure the positive droplets (blue/green) are separated from the negative droplets (grey) (Figure 15-Figure 16). Figure 15. ddPCR 2-D plot [3,11] Figure 16. ddPCR 1-D plot [11]
Prepare 20X target primers/probe.
For each PCR tube: DNA sample (Up to 350 ng ) + Master Mix = 22 µL .
Prepare Master Mix – Number of reactions + 1.
creator: Claire D Clelland
